{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Wei elders
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Wei elders]] act as conductors for the [[White Fox]] [[madra]] display.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8">''Unsouled'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Wei clan]] elders stand on a hill overlooking the road.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
